decisions.recommendation: Use versioned bounded task output stages, truncation-only escalation, a 0.85 context safety ratio, a 256-token uncalibrated margin, a 0.50 conservative degraded threshold, and cumulative two/three-call ceilings.
Evaluate CUDA VRAM and host RAM independently, evaluate Apple unified memory as one pool, and apply the stricter absolute/proportional reserve per resource.
Disable general Apple Auto unless a verified shared-pool adapter or an exact trusted catalog envelope supplies attributable pressure/process/runtime evidence.
Restrict CUDA Auto to one exact physical GPU or one exact MIG instance; never sum devices without exact approved placement and per-device evidence.

retained_exact_token.interpretation: exact only for frozen request/model/instance/runtime bindings

retained_output_failures: two extended-context summaries exhausted 1024 tokens and became structurally unusable
one full-context cleanup exhausted 4096 tokens and returned malformed JSON
current_static_gaps: AdaptiveOutputBudgetPolicy permits parse-incomplete escalation without independent truncation
current system metrics parses only the first nvidia-smi GPU row
current system metrics does not bind GPU memory to an exact LM Studio PID or placement
no verified Apple LM Studio process/runtime adapter exists

phase_a_pre_materialization: freeze exact approved task profile, rendered messages, schema, identity, request digests, context tiers, output stages, call ceiling, token mode, platform class and policy versions
select the smallest configured initial output stage covering the contract-derived estimate
calculate conservative token demand and choose the smallest fitting approved context tier
collect platform resource snapshot and apply typed reserve gates
allow estimate-only materialization only when the exact profile explicitly permits it
otherwise return manual_approved_only or unavailable before load
phase_b_post_materialization: read back exact model, runtime, instance, context, parallelism, placement and load configuration
apply the loaded prompt template and tokenizer to the same frozen messages
re-evaluate exact prompt plus classified overhead, reserve and margin
read settled resource state with exact CUDA process/device attribution or verified Apple envelope
generate only after token and resource gates pass and increment one cumulative call counter
monitor immutable attempt, peak and pressure evidence
escalate output only for independent truncation when next-stage fit and call ceiling pass
release only owned resources and require cleanup read-back

token_policy.estimate_formula: E_chat + E_schema + E_task + R0 + M <= floor(context * 0.85)
token_policy.degraded_formula: E_chat + E_schema + E_task + hard_output_max + M <= floor(0.50 * floor(context * 0.85))
token_policy.exact_formula: T_sdk + H_schema + H_task + R0 + M <= floor(effective_context * 0.85)
token_policy.exact_label_boundary: Only T_sdk is exact until schema/task overhead is observed for the same binding.

cuda.placement_rule: one exact physical device UUID or one exact MIG instance handle

states.apple_verified: physical/available memory, pressure, exact process footprint and runtime active/cache/peak counters bound to one interval with tested reset/overlap semantics
states.apple_degraded_observed_envelope: exact trusted catalog envelope only; no upward extrapolation
states.apple_unavailable: required counter missing, attribution ambiguous, pressure warning/critical, or envelope shape mismatch

auto_without_exact_metrics.exact_token_count_missing: only conservative_estimate_allowed tasks below degraded threshold; otherwise unavailable
auto_without_exact_metrics.usage_missing: retain declared cap/call ceiling; disable usage reconciliation and usage-based truncation
auto_without_exact_metrics.cuda_process_or_device_attribution_missi: static estimate may reject; Auto unavailable
auto_without_exact_metrics.cuda_peak_envelope_missing: catalog-authorized single-device conservative estimate only; otherwise measurement required
auto_without_exact_metrics.apple_verified_adapter_missing: exact trusted catalog envelope only; otherwise Auto unavailable

rollback.inflight_behavior: policy change marks in-flight request generations stale at the publication fence

minimum_acceptance_tests: estimate-pass exact-fail replans with zero generation calls
explicit normal stop at cap does not escalate
only independent truncation increases output cap
all retry classes share one cumulative call counter
reserve equality underflow unknown and stale states
CUDA VRAM and host RAM are independent
MIG requires a specific instance handle and exact process placement
Apple overlapping counters are not summed
Apple warning or critical pressure blocks Auto
missing Apple adapter permits only exact trusted envelope
cancellation and stale generation prevent persistence
rollback disables future Auto and invalidates in-flight publication

calibration_plan.promotion_rule: observed upper bound remains below configured reserve

official_sources.topic: LM Studio exact loaded-model prompt token method
NVIDIA NVML device memory, process and MIG queries
MLX memory management counters and controls

non_claims: No production model task profile context tier memory envelope latency target or semantic threshold is approved.
Provisional numeric values and sample counts are not universal hardware or statistical facts.
Static estimates free memory and file size are not observed peak memory.
MLX counters are not proven available or attributable through external LM Studio.
recommendedMaxWorkingSetSize is not OS available memory or a guaranteed allocation.
Current first-row nvidia-smi telemetry is insufficient for multi-device or process-safe Auto.
No live execution or implementation is authorized.
